prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF CYANIDE-BOUND HUMAN MYELOPEROXIDASE ISOFORM C AT PH 5.5. Entity description: MYELOPEROXIDASE. Organism: Homo sapiens. Polymer composition: protein/oligosaccharide. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_complex_not_assembly_required, hard_topology_word_withheld:disulfide_secretory_context. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: cofactor_context generic_complex_only heme_context ligand_context metal_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. generic complex alone is not assembly_required_core. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public component list contains biological cofactor candidates: ['CA', 'HEM']
public title/description/keywords mention ligand or cofactor context
generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence
hard topology hint disulfide_secretory_context is recorded for postseal mining, not handed to E65 as a solved word

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
